We welcome you to Edge. We have an import article available here: https://edgeapp.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/13160464080539-Move-Your-Crypto-From-Jaxx-Liberty-to-Edge


Please follow through the steps carefully, and we'll be happy to answer any questions or concerns that may come during the import process.
